series_metadata.series_title: Minority Families Reference and Resource File
series_metadata.series_description: Articles, brochures, books, pamphlets, speaker lists, and other reference materials pertaining to minority families and minority adoption.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office 2 years and 3 years in records center, then review by State Archives for possible retention or destruction. ; Electronic: Retain in office 2 years and 3 years in records center, then review by State Archives for possible retention or destruction., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
